overall.description: A cinematic game sequence from a third-person perspective following a wooden boat with two characters rowing through an ancient waterway surrounded by rocky cliffs and ruins. The journey progresses from a shaded overhang through open waters toward a massive industrial water wheel under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient waterway emerging from rocky overhang

events.description: boat emerges from under rocky overhang into open sunlit water
large ancient stone structure with metal gears becomes visible on left bank

agents.ego_description: two characters rowing a wooden boat steadily forward, navigating from shaded cover into open water

entered.detail: large rocky ceiling formation covering the waterway at the start
massive stone and metal structure with large mechanical gears on the left bank
tall rocky cliffs lining the left side of the waterway
rocky outcrops and cliffs on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a rocky overhang in shade, then emerges into bright sunlight revealing an ancient waterway. The boat rows steadily toward a large stone structure featuring prominent mechanical gears on the left bank, with rocky formations lining both sides of the channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water between scattered rocky islands

events.description: passing the ancient gear structure and entering open water with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: rowing through open water between scattered rocky islands and formations

entered.detail: large standalone rock formation rising from the water on the left
rocky island with sparse vegetation on the right side
natural rock arch formation visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gear structure, the boat navigates through wide open waters dotted with rocky islands. The camera follows smoothly as the boat moves between scattered rock formations under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with primitive settlement on right bank

events.description: waterway narrows into a canyon passage with cliffs closing in on both sides
primitive wooden huts and settlement structures appear on the right bank

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrower channel, passing close to the settlement structures on the right shore

entered.detail: small wooden and thatch-roofed huts built on the rocky shoreline
rustic wooden platforms and scaffolding along the right bank
smaller wooden water wheel structure visible among the settlement

segments.scene_description: The waterway narrows into a canyon-like passage where primitive wooden huts and scaffolding appear on the right bank, suggesting an ancient settlement. The boat continues forward through the confined channel with rocky walls closing in on both sides.

events.description: massive industrial water wheel structure comes into view directly ahead
boat slows slightly as it approaches the massive water wheel structure

agents.ego_description: rowing steadily toward the massive water wheel, approaching the ancient industrial structure

entered.detail: enormous wooden and metal water wheel structure dominating the center of the waterway ahead
tall cylindrical stone tower with metal bands on the right side
wooden barrier and support structures on the left bank near the wheel

segments.scene_description: The waterway opens up to reveal a massive industrial water wheel complex ahead. The boat approaches the enormous wooden wheel structure flanked by stone towers and wooden scaffolding, slowing as it nears the ancient mechanism that blocks the forward passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded rocky corridor into a vast, sun-drenched aquatic landscape. It begins under a dark rocky overhang before emerging into bright sunlight that reveals an ancient waterway lined with steep stone formations. As the boat rows forward, the camera passes a large stone structure featuring prominent mechanical gears on the left bank. The scene then opens into wide, expansive waters where the boat navigates between scattered rocky islands under a bright blue sky filled with fluffy clouds.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast industrial complex. It begins within a confined waterway where the walls close in, passing primitive wooden huts and scaffolding clinging to the right bank. As the boat pushes forward through the restrictive channel, the rocky cliffs begin to recede and the horizon expands. The scene then opens to reveal a massive industrial water wheel flanked by towering stone structures and intricate wooden scaffolding. The camera continues its approach toward the enormous mechanism, slowing as the ancient wheel comes to dominate the view and block the forward passage.
